'''Aram''' was the tropical [[Planet/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Aramandi]] species. Located in the [[Aramand Cluster]] in the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]]; it was orbited by a lone [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. It possessed a higher than average [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]], which caused the Aramandi to be short and stout.

{{Planet-stub}}
